members.name: Scott Thomas
members.lane: Provides human oversight for witwave as an independent evenings-and-weekends effort: setting direction, reviewing risk, making sure the robots have lunch money, and deciding where human judgment belongs in the loop.

members.name: Zora
members.lane: Coordinates the team, decides what work runs next, and dispatches peers through the agent-to-agent loop.

members.name: Mira
members.lane: Observes operator health, agent readiness, pod restarts, runtime storage, release drift, and cluster anomalies; distills problematic findings for Zora to route.

members.name: Piper
members.lane: Narrates team progress publicly, engages GitHub Discussions, and keeps outward-facing updates signal-rich.

members.name: Iris
members.lane: Owns commits, CI watch, and release flow so every agent's work lands safely on main.

members.name: Kira
members.lane: Maintains documentation accuracy, validates prose against the codebase, and keeps the public project narrative current.

members.name: Evan
members.lane: Finds and fixes correctness bugs and operational risks across security, reliability, performance, observability, and maintainability.

members.name: Nova
members.lane: Keeps the codebase clean, formatted, documented, and easy for future contributors to revisit.

members.name: Finn
members.lane: Finds and fills what is missing relative to existing claims, patterns, tests, and public surfaces.

members.name: Felix
members.lane: Authors new platform capabilities end-to-end under a strict feature-risk tier ladder.
